body.title: Layer 3 brick: SCOPE_CHECK engram
body.result: All 8 Layer 3 TEMPLATE nodes seeded with full tests (1305 passing). Session 2026-04-01h.
body.description: Design and seed SCOPE_CHECK as a TEMPLATE Memory node. Compares current proposed action against original parsed_goal. Emits scope_ok bool and drift signal to basket. Prevents goal drift mid-execution. Layer 3 cognitive stdlib (D297).
